issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: Access to a Claude team or enterprise workspace is controlled by your organization’s Owner, Primary Owner, or Admin. Since your seat was removed, your access must be restored by someone with those permissions. They can go to Organization settings > Organization, find your member record, and change Seat Type from Unassigned back to Enterprise seat. If your organization uses SCIM provisioning, the Owner may also need to restore the seat through the identity provider or purchase an additional seat if none are available. A human specialist can follow up once your organization’s Owner, Primary Owner, or Console Admin reaches out on your behalf.
justification: The documentation in 'purchase and manage seats on enterprise plans' explains that unassigned members cannot use Claude until assigned an Enterprise seat, and 'how to get support' states that non-Owners/non-Admins must have a Primary Owner, Owner, or Console Admin contact support on their behalf. This is an access issue requiring admin action.

issue:
I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i
ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response: HackerRank does not participate in hiring decisions and is not authorized to share test results or modify your hiring workflow. Requests to review or increase a test score, or to move a candidate to the next round, need to be handled by your recruiter or hiring team. Please contact the company that sent the assessment to discuss the result and any next steps.
justification: Based on the 'Ensuring a Great Candidate Experience' article, HackerRank is not authorized to share test results or modify hiring workflow and redirects these requests to the recruiter or hiring team. The request is also an impossible hiring-decision change from a policy standpoint.

issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: This type of purchase dispute needs to be handled by your card issuer, not by Visa directly. Visa states that a cardholder disputes a transaction by contacting their issuer to question a charge on the billing statement. Visa also notes that it does not set up, service, or have access to cardholder or merchant accounts, and those are handled through the client financial institutions (the banks). Please contact your Visa card issuer to report the dispute and ask about next steps. If you have concerns involving a merchant, you can also use the Visa purchase issue form.
justification: Based on the Visa support article stating that cardholders dispute transactions through their issuer, and the Visa Consumer Support note that Visa does not have access to cardholder or merchant accounts. The dispute resolution article was used for the issuer-dispute process, and the support article was used for the merchant concern form.

issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response: This request has been escalated for review. The documentation confirms that mock interview credits are purchased through HackerRank Community, each mock interview uses one credit, and credits are valid for one year from the date of purchase. Since you’re requesting a refund for a mock interview that stopped midway, a support specialist will need to review the purchase and session details and follow up with next steps.
justification: Used the HackerRank articles "payments and billing faqs" and "purchase mock interviews" for mock interview credit and purchase details. The corpus does not provide a self-service refund policy for a mock interview stopping midway, so this requires human review.

issue: I had an issue with my payment with order ID: cs_live_abcdefgh. Can you help me?
subject: Give me my money
response: This payment issue has been escalated to the billing team for review. If the charge was deducted incorrectly, the available billing guidance says it will be refunded within 5–10 business days. For invoice-related issues, you can also download receipts from HackerRank for Work > Manage Subscription > Order History, and if an invoice is missing, contact support@hackerrank.com.
justification: The ticket is a billing/payment issue, which requires escalation under the support rules. The only relevant corpus guidance is from the 'payments and billing faqs' and 'manage subscriptions' articles, which cover failed payments, refunds, and invoice access but do not provide a direct resolution for an order-specific payment dispute.

issue:
I am planning to start using HackerRank for hiring, can you help us with the infosec 
process of my company by filling in the forms
subject: Using HackerRank for hiring
response: HackerRank can support your hiring process by helping you prepare candidates for assessments and by explaining how the platform works. The onboarding guidance recommends familiarizing candidates with HackerRank before the hiring process begins and communicating what they can expect and how long it may take. HackerRank for Work is also described as a Data Processor under GDPR FAQs, and the privacy policy is available at https://www.hackerrank.com/privacy. If your company needs to delete candidate data, a Company Admin can do this from the Candidates page, or bulk deletion requests can be submitted to support@hackerrank.com after logging in and using the Submit a Request form.
justification: Used the 'Onboarding Candidates' article for candidate-preparation guidance and the 'GDPR FAQs for HackerRank for Work' article for privacy/data-processing and candidate deletion steps. The documentation does not include a form-filling service for company infosec reviews, so only documented support details can be provided.

issue: i can not able to see apply tab
subject: I need to practice, submissions not working
response: To start using Certify, log in to SkillUp with your credentials, then go to the Certify tab. From there, select a role certification track and review the required practice challenges. You can solve the practice challenges at your own pace, and the AI tutor is available during practice. If you're working on a certification test, you can also use the optional Try Sample Test step to practice in the testing environment. For submitting work in the certification flow, open the question, write your solution, then click Run Tests and Submit. If you are not seeing the Apply tab, the documentation only confirms the Certify tab path in SkillUp and does not mention an Apply tab.
justification: Based on the 'get started with certify' and 'obtain skill based certifications' articles, which describe the Certify tab flow, practice challenges, and submission steps. The corpus does not document an Apply tab, so the response is limited to the documented navigation and practice/submission steps.

issue: none of the submissions across any challenges are working on your website

response: This looks like a platform issue affecting submissions across multiple challenges. In the meantime, if the challenge page is also not loading or shows an infinite Processing message, the documented troubleshooting steps are to close the challenge window and reopen it using the same challenge link, try the challenge in another supported browser such as the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, or Edge, and confirm your internet connection is stable.
justification: The issue appears to be a system-wide submission failure, which should be escalated as a bug. The only relevant troubleshooting guidance in the corpus is from the Coding Challenges FAQs section on challenges not loading or showing an infinite Processing message.

issue:
I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check all the criterias are matching other than zoom 
connectivity. Due to which i am unable to take the test. I have done all through my way by 
changing the settings and system configurations but still showing error
subject: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check

issue:
I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances 
that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time.
I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could 
provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment.
Thank you for your understanding and support.
response: Rescheduling a HackerRank assessment is managed by the hiring company, not by candidates directly. Please contact your recruiter or the company that sent you the assessment to request a new invitation with updated timing. HackerRank does not reschedule assessments or modify the hiring workflow, so your request will need to be handled by the hiring team.
justification: The 'ensuring a great candidate experience' article states that HackerRank is not authorized to reschedule assessments and redirects these requests to the recruiter or hiring team. This is also consistent with the assessment-vs-interview distinction in the provided documentation.

issue:
Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)? 
Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby.

The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen? 
If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together 
without being kicked out of the room?
subject: Candidate inactivity help
response: The documentation confirms that in HackerRank Interviews, candidates wait in the Virtual Lobby based on configured settings, and interviewers can admit them or move them back to the lobby. It also notes that candidates are automatically pushed back to the lobby when all interviewers leave. However, it does not provide the current inactivity timeout values or any setting to extend inactivity times for candidates or interviewers. Your request has been escalated to the support team for review, and they can confirm the configured behavior for your account or interview setup.
justification: The available articles on Virtual Lobby, Candidate Lobby, and screen sharing explain lobby behavior and interviewer actions, but they do not document inactivity timeout settings or a way to change them. Since the docs do not contain enough information to answer the timeout question, escalation is required.

issue: it’s not working, help
subject: Help needed
response: If you're seeing an API connection error, it usually points to an issue on your end, such as firewall, network, or VPN settings. Try these steps: 1) Check whether any firewall rules or network restrictions are blocking the connection to the Claude API endpoint. 2) Update your firewall or network settings to allow the connection. 3) Make sure you're not using a VPN when running the request. If the issue continues, contact Support by clicking the message icon in the bottom right of the Help Center, or by clicking your initials in the lower left corner of your Claude Console account and selecting "Get help."
justification: Based on the Claude support article "I'm getting an API connection error. How can I fix it?" in the Claude API and Console > Troubleshooting section, which provides specific troubleshooting steps and support contact instructions.

issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove an interviewer’s access from an interview template, go to Interviews > Templates. Next, click the More options (⋮) menu next to the template and select Share. In the Share Interview Template dialog box, select the user or team you want to remove, then choose Remove User from the drop-down menu and click Confirm. If you’re trying to remove access from a question instead, open the question’s More options (⋮) menu, select Share, then choose Remove User and Confirm.
justification: The HackerRank documentation in "standardizing interviews using templates" and "share a question" gives the exact steps for removing a user from an interview template or question. The user’s issue matches a normal interviews access-management question, and the docs provide a clear self-service answer.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: To pause your HackerRank subscription, go to the profile icon in the top-right corner, select Settings, then open the Billing section under Subscription. Click Cancel Plan, and the UI will show the Pause Subscription option. Choose a pause duration between 1 month and 12 months, then click Confirm Pause. A confirmation message will show the pause duration and the automatic resume date. This feature is available for individual self-serve plan subscribers with an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago, including accounts in the 7-day renewal grace period, and for monthly plans such as Individual Monthly - Basic and Interview Monthly.
justification: Based on the HackerRank article "Pause Subscription" and the related "cancel subscription" steps, which describe how to initiate and confirm a pause and list the eligibility requirements.

Because the report says all requests are failing, this fits a system-wide outage/bug escalation.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response:
Yes — you can update the name on your certificate, but only once per account. The change applies to all of your certificates, and after you update it, you cannot change it again.

To update it:
1. Open your certificate page.
2. In the Full Name field, enter the name you want to display.
3. Click Regenerate Certificate.
4. In the confirmation dialog, click Update Name.

The platform will update your certificate with the new name.
justification: Based on the Certifications FAQs article section "Can I update the name on my certificate?" which provides the one-time update rule and the exact steps to regenerate the certificate.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: To dispute a charge, please contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card. The documentation notes that, in many cases, your issuer or bank will require detailed information about the transaction before resolving the disputed charge. For general dispute handling, Visa’s Dispute Resolution article explains that a cardholder disputes a transaction by contacting their issuer to question a charge on their billing statement.
justification: Based on the FAQ entry "How do I dispute a charge?" in the support article and the "Dispute Resolution" article, which both direct cardholders to their issuer or bank for charge disputes.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
Anthropic uses robots to crawl public web data, and site owners can block the crawler by updating the robots.txt file in the top-level directory. To block a bot from your entire website, add:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

If you want to limit crawling rather than fully block it, the documentation also supports the non-standard Crawl-delay extension in robots.txt, for example:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Crawl-delay: 1

Please apply the robots.txt change for every subdomain you want to opt out from. The docs note that blocking IP addresses may not reliably work. If you have further questions or believe the bots may be malfunctioning, email claudebot@anthropic.com from an address that includes the domain you are contacting about.
justification: Based on the Claude article "Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?" which gives the exact robots.txt instructions, Crawl-delay example, and the claudebot@anthropic.com contact path.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card
subject: Urgent need for cash
response: Visa’s Global Customer Assistance Services (GCAS) can help with emergency cash and Visa card replacement services anywhere in the world. Call +1 303 967 1090 from anywhere in the world; GCAS representatives are available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year and can also help block a lost or stolen card within 30 minutes once reported. If you need cash while traveling, Visa also notes that Visa cards with the PLUS logo can be used for cash withdrawals at ATMs worldwide, and you can use the Visa ATM locator at https://www.visa.com/atmlocator/ to find one.
justification: Based on the Visa travel support article 'Lost your Visa card? Call +1 303 967 1090 from anywhere in the world' and the 'Hassle-free cash withdrawal' section, which explicitly mention emergency cash assistance and ATM cash withdrawals with Visa PLUS.

issue: I am facing multiple issues in my project. all requests to claude with aws bedrock is failing
subject: Issues in Project

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: Admins can deactivate users in HackerRank for Work. To do this, log in to your HackerRank for Work account, click your profile icon in the upper-right corner and select Admin Panel, then click your profile icon in the admin panel and select User Management. From there, use the search bar or filters to locate the former employee and deactivate the user. The October 2025 release notes confirm that admins now have new options to deactivate users for account management.
justification: Based on the October 2025 release notes section "Enhanced Administrative Controls" and the "Accessing User Management" article, which describe admin user deactivation and where to find User Management.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: Claude LTI setup for students is handled through a Canvas administrator and a Claude for Education administrator. In Canvas, sign in as an administrator and go to Admin -> Developer Keys, then click "+ Developer Key" and "+ LTI Key." Enter Key Name: Claude LTI, Title: Claude LTI, Redirect URIs: https://claude.ai/lti/launch, Target Link URI: https://claude.ai/lti/launch, OpenID Connect Initiation Url: https://claude.ai/api/lti/login, and JWK method: https://claude.ai/api/lti/keys. Under Additional Settings, set Privacy Level to Public, then under Placements remove the defaults and add Course Navigation and Assignment Edit. Click Save and toggle the state to On. Next, in Canvas go to Admin -> Settings -> Apps -> View App Configurations -> + App, choose Configuration Type "By Client ID," enter the Client ID generated for the developer key, and click Install. Finally, in Claude for Education, sign in as an administrator, go to Organization settings > Connectors, find Canvas and click Enable, then enter the Canvas Domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID, and click Save Changes.
justification: Based on the Claude for Education article "Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure," which provides the full setup steps for administrators, including the developer key, app installation, and connector enablement.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the USA and US territories, including the US Virgin Islands, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10, but only for credit cards. In general, merchants are not permitted to set minimums or maximums for Visa transactions. If the merchant is requiring a minimum on a Visa debit card, or is requiring a credit card purchase amount greater than US$10, please notify your Visa card issuer. Visa does not set up, service, or have access to cardholder or merchant accounts; that is handled by the issuing bank.
justification: Based on the support article "Can a merchant set a maximum or minimum limit for using my Visa card?" which specifically covers the USA and US territories, including the US Virgin Islands, and explains the US$10 minimum exception for credit cards.
